chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-1405 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-6866/13 2. For orders on MA-6867/13 3. For hearing of main case. 17.10.2019. Mr. Masood-ul-Nabi Bachani, advocate for petitioner. = Heard arguments and perused the record. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for declaration to the effect that his village Bhadur Dodani is legal and sanctioned village and respondents be restrained from transferring or alienation the same to anyone else in any manner. The controversy with regard to declaration of status of village Bhadur Dodani and its transfer/ alienation being landed property to anyone else by the respondents being issue of fact could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. The instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. The petitioner to approach Revenue / Civil Court having jurisdiction for redressal of his grievance in accordance with law, if so is advised. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
